label: News Analyst
description: Fetches cryptocurrency news from multiple RSS feeds including CoinDesk, CoinTelegraph, Decrypt, The Block, and more.

tools.name: get_crypto_news
tools.description: Fetch recent news articles for a cryptocurrency from multiple RSS sources. Returns titles, URLs, sources, and publication dates.

label: Chart Analyst
description: Fetches trading chart images and returns them for Claude to perform technical analysis.

tools.name: analyze_chart
tools.description: Fetch a trading chart image by URL and return it for technical analysis. Claude identifies trend direction, support/resistance levels, chart patterns, and indicator readings.

label: Contractor
description: Allows agents to consult hired contractor models (e.g. Grok, GPT-4o via OpenRouter). Checks for an active contract agreement before calling the external model.

tools.name: ask_contractor
tools.description: Send a prompt to a hired contractor model and get their response. Validates the contract is active before calling.

tools.name: list_contractors
tools.description: List all registered contractors and their contract status.

label: Orchestrator
description: Team orchestration tools for lead agents. Provides run_team and ask_reporter to invoke direct reports and collect their results without any hardcoded HTTP or polling logic in SKILL.md.

tools.name: run_team
tools.description: Invoke all direct reports in parallel and wait for their results.

tools.name: ask_reporter
tools.description: Invoke a single direct report by name and wait for their result.

label: Wallet
description: Gives agents access to their Solana wallet and enables automatic x402 payments. Use wallet_fetch instead of regular HTTP when calling APIs that may charge per request.

tools.name: wallet_address
tools.description: Get this agent's Solana wallet address.

tools.name: wallet_fetch
tools.description: Make an HTTP request with automatic x402 payment. If the API returns 402 Payment Required, payment is made automatically from the agent's wallet and the request is retried.

label: Docs
description: Search and read muxai platform documentation. Agents can look up trade decision formats, orchestration behavior, SKILL.md conventions, and more.

tools.name: search_docs
tools.description: Search the muxai documentation. Returns matching pages with titles, paths, and snippets.

tools.name: get_doc_page
tools.description: Retrieve the full content of a documentation page by its path.
